description: Health Canada approved pembrolizumab as a monotherapy for treatment of adult patients with metastatic NSCLC whose tumours express PD-L1 (TPS ≥ 1%) as determined by a validated test and who have disease progression on or after platinum-containing chemotherapy.

indication.indication: KEYTRUDA (pembrolizumab) is indicated Keytruda as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic NSCLC whose tumours express PD-L1 (TPS ≥ 1%) as determined by a validated test and who have disease progression on or after platinum-containing chemotherapy.
